patch.value:
## Agent need
pm is a universal PM tool that ships primitives via an SDK, so any project can extend it (custom commands, types, search, importers, hooks) without forking the core.

## Delivered surface (pm-ugqx)
src/sdk define/compose/runtime/testing; extension loader + registries; capability-usage least-privilege; 11 first-party packages as exemplars; pm-claude/pm-codex plugins.

## Verified by
Scaffold capability matrix (9/9), sandbox tarball install tests (CJS + ESM). Enduring agent-value statement for the extension/SDK capability; new work lands in pm-ugqx.
As a third-party author, I want an SDK to compose, validate, test, and ship a pm extension or package, so that pm can be customized and optimized for any project without forking

define*/compose*/synthesize/lint/preflight builders exist; createExtensionTestHarness + assert*/run*ForTest cover every surface; scaffold emits a runnable extension; capability/policy/trust/sandbox are enforced; installs work in both CJS and ESM host projects.
Delivered and maintained by pm-ugqx: SDK define/compose/testing builders, extension runtime, 11 packages, and plugin integrations.
Any project customizes and optimizes pm via the SDK without forking.
SDK builders + test harness + 11 packages + CJS/ESM install support shipped.
Delivered and maintained by pm-ugqx: SDK define/compose/testing builders, extension runtime, 11 packages, and plugin integrations.
